Class ConsumerConfigProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.boot.pulsar.autoconfigure.PulsarProperties.Consumer
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.pulsar.properties.ConsumerConfigProperties
Direct Known Subclasses:
PulsarConsumerProperties
public class ConsumerConfigProperties extends org.springframework.boot.pulsar.autoconfigure.PulsarProperties.Consumer
Configuration properties used to specify Pulsar consumers.
Author:
Chris Bono
